overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a medieval-themed video game showing a hooded character in a red embroidered cloak walking through a historic village at night. The character traverses narrow market streets, covered stone passages, and open squares illuminated by warm lanterns and torchlight against a dark blue starry sky, eventually approaching a grand stone mansion.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow village market street with wooden stalls and hanging lanterns

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow village street passing wooden market stalls and villagers

notable_agents.action: villager in brown cloak walking alongside the path
villager standing near wooden structure watching the street

entered.detail: wooden stall with fabric awning and goods displayed
warm glowing lanterns suspended on ropes across the street
two-story stone building with wooden upper floor
stacked wooden barrels and sacks along the wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow medieval village street at night, passing wooden market stalls and stone buildings illuminated by warm hanging lanterns. The ground is dirt with scattered straw, and a few villagers are visible walking or standing near the stalls.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stone stairway passage with wooden platforms

events.description: entering covered stone passage from open village street
ascending wooden stairs through the covered passage

agents.ego_description: climbing wooden stairs through a covered stone passage with red fabric canopy overhead

entered.detail: stone archway marking the entrance to the covered passage
red fabric draped overhead between stone walls creating a covered walkway
wooden plank stairs ascending through the passage
rough stone walls of the narrow passage

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered stone passage with a red fabric canopy overhead, ascending wooden stairs. The space is enclosed by rough stone walls and lit by wall-mounted torches, creating a warm, sheltered atmosphere distinct from the open street.

scene_state.functional_zone: open town square with cobblestones and scattered trees

events.description: exiting covered passage into open town square with cobblestone ground
turning slightly to navigate around villagers and chickens in the square

agents.ego_description: walking across the open town square navigating around villagers and free-roaming chickens

notable_agents.action: chicken wandering and pecking at the cobblestones
child running across the path toward the right side

entered.detail: wide open space of the town square visible ahead
large mature tree in the center of the square
wooden cart with wheels parked near the square edge
wet cobblestone pavement reflecting the lantern light

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered passage, the character enters a spacious town square paved with cobblestones and dominated by a large central tree. The area is more open with scattered villagers and chickens roaming freely, and the night sky is fully visible above.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cobblestone street between stone buildings with hanging red banners

events.description: entering narrow street from open town square
passing close to wooden scaffolding on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow street passing under large red banners hanging overhead

notable_agents.action: villager in dark clothing walking toward the camera

entered.detail: large red banner with yellow sun emblem hanging across the street
wooden construction scaffolding against the stone building
tall stone houses with timber framing and lit windows

segments.scene_description: The character enters a darker, narrower cobblestone street flanked by tall medieval stone houses. A large red banner with a yellow emblem hangs overhead, and wooden scaffolding is visible on the right side as the character passes villagers walking in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand approach to stone mansion with formal gardens and stairs

events.description: emerging from narrow street to open mansion approach
ascending the gentle slope toward the mansion stairs

agents.ego_description: walking up the cobblestone approach toward the grand stone mansion with illuminated windows

entered.detail: large two-story stone mansion with illuminated windows and grand entrance
wide stone stairs leading up to the mansion entrance
formal garden beds with red flowers lining the approach
ornate stone railing along the left side of the path
tall poles with red banners flanking the mansion approach

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the narrow street into a grand open approach leading to a large stone mansion. The area features formal gardens with red flower beds, stone balustrades, and banner poles, with the mansion's illuminated facade and staircase dominating the view ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a medieval village at night, transitioning from narrow market streets into a grand estate. It begins by following a character past wooden stalls and stone buildings illuminated by warm hanging lanterns, before moving into a sheltered stone passage with a red fabric canopy and torch-lit stairs. As the character emerges from the enclosure, the scene opens into a spacious cobblestone town square featuring a large central tree and roaming chickens under a starry sky. The camera then shifts back into a darker, narrower street flanked by tall houses and red banners, passing wooden scaffolding and oncoming villagers. Finally, the path expands into a formal approach with red flower beds and stone balustrades, leading directly toward the illuminated facade of a grand stone mansion.
